entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Code Ultra Deploys Agent Fleets to Verify Every Bug
entry.summary: Claude Code's /code-review command now has five distinct effort tiers, each with a different review strategy â topped by a cloud-based multi-agent fleet that Anthropic runs on every internal PR.

entry.title: LM Studio Ships Bionic, a Full AI Agent Built on Open Local Models
entry.summary: LM Studio launches Bionic, an agentic AI for open models with local voice transcription, document editing, coding, and privacy-first cloud inference via Zero Data Retention.

entry.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 Drops 2.8 Trillion Parameters to Beat OpenAI and Anthropic
entry.summary: Moonshot AI's 2.8T parameter Kimi K3 launches with frontier-level agentic performance, a 1M token context window, and open weights on the way

entry.title: Cognition Offers Startups $65K to Build Their Entire Codebase With Devin
entry.summary: Cognition launches 'Devin for Startups,' offering VC-backed early-stage teams up to $65K in credits and matching grants to integrate the AI coding agent into their engineering workflow.

entry.title: Google's Nano Banana Now Lets You Drop Yourself Into Any AI Video
entry.summary: Gemini now lets you set up a persistent digital avatar once and place yourself in any AI-generated image or video without re-uploading a selfie each time.

entry.title: Manus Ships typst-pdf-maker Turning Plain Prompts Into Print-Ready PDFs
entry.summary: Manus adds a /typst-pdf-maker skill that turns a single prompt into a professionally typeset PDF, no LaTeX or design tools required.

entry.title: StackBlitz Ships Bolt Slides, Turning Presentations Into Live React Web Apps
entry.summary: StackBlitz open-sources Bolt Slides, a React-based presentation engine that lets any AI agent build fully interactive, web-native decks from a single prompt.

entry.title: microagi Raises Germany's Biggest Seed Round to Teach Factory Robots Real Jobs
entry.summary: microagi raises a record $55M seed round to teach factory robots by filming human workers â no robots or models required

entry.title: NVIDIA's DeepStream 9.1 Lets AI Agents Build Multi-Camera Tracking Without Manual Setup
entry.summary: DeepStream 9.1 ships 13 agentic skills that let coding agents like Claude Code build full multi-camera 3D tracking pipelines from a plain-English prompt

entry.title: Sakana AI Wires NVIDIA Nemotron Into Fugu, Beating Claude and GPT-5.5 on Coding
entry.summary: Sakana AI integrates NVIDIA's Nemotron open model family into its Fugu multi-agent orchestrator, creating a feedback loop that could redefine how open models get deployed in production.

entry.title: Google Research Finally Explains Why Diffusion Models Don't Just Copy Training Data
entry.summary: Google Research proves mathematically that diffusion model creativity is a side effect of regularization, not magic â and releases code to explore it
